content:
# Session 24 ‚Äî review (iter-024)

## Metadata
- **NO PROVER LANE** this iter (`attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1: `no_prover_lane: true`).
  Intentional hard-gate skip ‚Äî S2 blueprint/strategy-prep iter, not a stall.
- Sorry count: unchanged (S3 cone = 0 since iter-023; only off-cone `sheafOf_singlePoint_iso`
  L772 remains, dag used-by 0). No `.lean` file modified (`git diff` n/a ‚Äî fresh tree, all staged).
- Targets attempted: none (no prover dispatched).

## What happened this iter (plan-phase activity)
S3 closed iter-023 (OcOfD cone 2‚Üí0). S2 (H‚Å±(C,ùí™_C(D)) finiteness) became the lead. All 4 leandag
frontier nodes pin to non-existent decls (scaffold-stage) ‚áí no ready fill-sorry target ‚áí the plan
agent correctly ran a blueprint/strategy-prep iter with **no prover dispatch**:
- **S2 restructure** (strategy-critic CHALLENGE corrective, via blueprint-writer + blueprint-clean):
  DROPPED the general Grothendieck H^{‚â•2}=0 gate (free via 2-elt-cover ƒåech-concentration); ADDED
  load-bearing prereq `lem:HModule_affine_acyclic` (kÃÑ-mod affine acyclicity, Hart. III.3.5); NARROWED
  the ƒåech=derived CRUX to the single sheaf ùí™_C (honest new ƒåech‚ÜîExt-in-ModuleCat-kÃÑ material ‚Äî no
  Mathlib affine-acyclicity off-shelf, leansearch-confirmed).
- Coverage-debt clears (plan tex edits): 2 iter-023 OcOfD helpers `_inv_coe`/`_hom_coe` pinned;
  `AbelianVarietyRigidity.lean` added to RationalCurveIso.tex `% archon:covers`.
- STRATEGY.md S3‚ÜíCompleted; S2 row trimmed to ~12KB ceiling.

## Verification this review
- `sync_leanok` ran (iter=24, sha 4a6de09, +4/‚àí0, OcOfD only) ‚Äî the 4 added markers are the
  `_inv_coe`/`_hom_coe`/related helper proof-blocks pinned this iter (proven axiom-clean iter-023).
  Correct; **no manual `\leanok` override owed**.
- `blueprint-doctor`: CLEAN (no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no new axioms).
- `archon dag-query gaps`: **0** (no ‚àû holes).
- `archon dag-query unmatched`: 144 nodes. ALL out-of-cone substrate (ProjectiveLineBar, rigidity,
  Gm/Ga scaling, homogeneousLocalization, Cohomology/*) per the standing "no blueprint owed" policy,
  EXCEPT two residual S3-cone helpers ‚Äî see recommendations.

## Key finding ‚Äî S2 substrate already exists (non-obvious, reusable)
The unmatched-node scan surfaced substantial **pre-existing S2/cohomology Lean infrastructure** in the
out-of-cone `Cohomology/*` substrate, all proved sorry-free: `Scheme.HModule'`,
`IsAffineHModuleVanishing`, `IsCechAcyclicCover`, `cechCochain`/`cechCochain_OC`,
`module_finite_HModule'_zero_curve`, `subsingleton_HModule'_supr_of_isCechAcyclicCover_curve`,
`toModuleKSheaf_forgetCompare`, `instHasExt_Sheaf_Opens_AddCommGrp`, etc. The S2 lead is "from-scratch"
only at the `SerreFiniteness.lean` *assembly* level ‚Äî much of the ƒåech/HModule plumbing is already
landed. The next S2 scaffold should survey this substrate before building, to avoid duplicating it.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- (none) ‚Äî no prover renames, no Mathlib-anchor adds, no stale `\notready`/`% NOTE` this iter. The S3
  `% NOTE` was already corrected iter-023. sync handled the 4 `\leanok` adds correctly.

## Notes (LOW)
- Documentation-rot watch CARRIES: stale status docstrings in OcOfD.lean (module header, "3-tier
  disclosure", L647‚Äì668 else-branch "residual sorry", cokernel/B1 comments) ‚Äî comment-only, review
  cannot edit `.lean`; fold a comment-refresh into the next OcOfD prover lane if one is ever re-opened
  (S3 is closed, so low priority).

## Subagent reports
- None dispatched (skips justified in `iter/iter-024/review.md`).
